text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down nearly 3% over the past day, with altcoins holding relatively steady, suggesting a broad selloff rather than selective profit-taking. The Fear & Greed index at 15 reflects extreme fear that has intensified over the past week, indicating capitulation-level sentiment among retail traders. Bitcoin dominance at 55.4% and $76B in daily volume point to a market in retrenchment mode, where investors are rotating toward the largest assets amid uncertainty rather than deploying fresh capital.
